title: Cheesy
description: Adds cheese and cheese related items
body:
If you mix milk and water in a crafting table, you get...
Milk liquid! This is a placable milk that is slower than water, but faster than lava.
If you make a smithing table, but you forget the bottom, you get...
A fermenter! This is a furnace-like item that if you feul with lava or coal blocks, you can ferment liquid milk to get...
Cheese! This is an awesome cheesy item that is  really tasty. If you find tomatoes in places where flowers grow, you can plant them (anywhere, this mod is in beta) and let them grow, you get...
Tomatoes! These are also tasty. Now, if you find a fern and collect it, you can craft it into...
Lettuce! This is, again, tasty. Now, if you put one bread in the middle top of a crafting table, cheese, tomato, lettuce, in that order, in the middle, and bread in the bottom middle, you can make a sandwich! Don't mess it up though...
If you smelt milk instead of fermenting it, you make...
Yogurt!
This mod is innacurate to real life and is my first mod. Note: Tomatoes don't naturally generate in 1.0, use 1.1.0 for that.
